title: 10 best herbal essential oils for dry nose
description: Mentha x piperita, also known as peppermint, essential oils helps with dry nose because of its natural decongestant and moisturizing properties. The menthol content in peppermint oil helps to thin out mucus, making it easier to breathe and reducing congestion. Additionally, peppermint oil's anti-inflammatory properties soothe and calm the nasal passages, promoting healing and reducing dryness.
